jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at DMart
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with DMart! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
